title: IWholesome Zanzibari Almond Pilaf
description: A nutty and tender quick-fix Turkish dish featuring dried mint, almonds, and other flexible ingredients suitable for flexitarian diets.
instructions: Rinse quinoa and soak in cold water for at least 30 minutes.
In a saucepan, bring water to boil. Add quinoa, salt, and minced garlic; reduce heat to low and simmer covered until liquid is absorbed (15-20 min).
Meanwhile, toast almonds in pan over medium-high heat, shaking often, for about 3 minutes or until lightly golden.
Drain quinoa, then mix with toasted almonds. Add mint, cheese, lemon juice, and extra salt if needed; toss gently to combine.
Spoon into serving bowls and garnish with additional fresh mint leaves.
